long_description:
[stgsre]-osprey-stgsre-observed-latency-in-attaching-volume [FRA] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/stg-blk-212-volume-attachement-latency.html
TIP Situation:                      Observed latency issue in latency-prod
TIP Short Description:              Observed latency in attaching volume
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-volume:eu-de:::service:

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:

Segment:

Time:                12/04/2025 04:58 AM UTC
State:               Triggered
